title: OHS Neck Pillow Leopard Print Travel Pillow, Soft Foam Neck Support Pillow Lightweight & Portable Support Cushion For Airplane Train Car, Natural-30x30cm
features: Travel Pillow: Stylish & Unique Design - Features a chic leopard print, adding a touch of personality and style to your travel essentials, while providing you with an eye-catching, fashionable accessory.
Lightweight & Portable: Weighs only a few ounces, making it easy to carry in your bag or backpack without adding extra bulk. Ideal for travel on the go.
Ergonomic Neck Support: Designed with soft, high-quality memory foam to provide optimal support and comfort for your neck, reducing strain during long trips on airplanes, trains, or cars.
Versatile Use: Perfect for use on airplanes, trains, cars, or even at home, this travel neck pillow helps ensure a restful sleep or comfortable rest during long periods of sitting.

Durable & Easy to Clean: The soft, breathable fabric ensures a comfortable experience, while its easy-to-clean material makes maintenance a breeze, keeping your pillow fresh and hygienic for every trip. The removable and washable cover ensures that your pillow stays fresh and clean, allowing you to easily maintain hygiene after multiple uses.
